title: Fix Authorization Barriers, Form Submission, Photo Storage & Admin Buttons

requirements.text: Remove all authorization error messages and re-login prompts from the Admin Dashboard and Admin QR Management panel. The admin user (vijay@123) must have permanent master access that never expires or requires re-authentication once logged in. Ensure that AuthContext persists the admin session reliably in localStorage so that page reloads or navigation between admin tabs never triggers an authorization error or redirects back to login.

quotes: Remove All Authorization Barriers: Admin panel aur QR Management se 'Authorization error' ya 'Re-login' ka message hamesha ke liye hatao. Admin (vijay@123) ko permanent master access do.

acceptanceCriteria: No 'Authorization error' or 'Re-login' message appears anywhere in the Admin Dashboard or Admin QR Management panel.
Admin session persists across page reloads and tab switches without requiring re-authentication.
Admin (vijay@123) retains full access to all admin features without interruption.
Registration and login components are not modified.

requirements.text: Fix form submission so it never returns a 'Failed' error. In the ServiceForm component, ensure the mutation correctly handles backend responses, retries on transient failures, and displays a clear success state. In the backend, optimize the submitOrder function to process requests efficiently — avoid unnecessary computations or unbounded loops that could cause hangs. Ensure the actor returns responses promptly so the frontend never times out waiting.

quotes: Fix Form Submission & Speed: Form submit hone par 'Failed' nahi hona chahiye. Backend ko optimize karo taaki data turant transfer ho aur app kabhi hang na kare.

acceptanceCriteria: Submitting a service form successfully saves the order and shows a success confirmation.
No 'Failed' error is shown on form submission under normal conditions.
Backend submitOrder function returns a response without hanging or timing out.
The app does not freeze or become unresponsive during or after form submission.

requirements.text: Fix the photo storage and retrieval so that clicking the 'Photo' button in the Admin Dashboard immediately displays the attached image without any ERR_FILE_NOT_FOUND error. Photos submitted with orders are stored as base64 strings in the backend. The admin dashboard must reconstruct a valid object URL or data URL from the stored base64 data and render it inline or in a new tab. Remove any file-path-based resolution that causes the not-found error.

quotes: Permanent Photo Storage: Admin dashboard mein 'Photo' button click karte hi image dikhni chahiye. ERR_FILE_NOT_FOUND ko hamesha ke liye theek karo.

acceptanceCriteria: Clicking the 'Photo' button on an order card in the Admin Dashboard opens or displays the attached photo immediately.
No ERR_FILE_NOT_FOUND or broken image error occurs.
Photos are displayed correctly for all previously submitted orders that included an image.
The fix works for both photo and document attachments stored as base64.

requirements.text: Activate the 'Accept' and 'Reject' buttons in the Admin Dashboard so that clicking them updates the order status in the backend and reflects the new status in the UI immediately. Wire the buttons to the existing updateOrderStatus backend function. On success, the order card should update to show the new status ('Accepted' or 'Rejected') and display a brief inline success message. On failure, show a clear error message on the card.

quotes: Activate Admin Buttons: 'Accept' aur 'Reject' buttons ko functional banao taaki main orders manage kar sakun.

acceptanceCriteria: Clicking 'Accept' on an order card calls the backend and updates the order status to 'Accepted'.
Clicking 'Reject' on an order card calls the backend and updates the order status to 'Rejected'.
The order card reflects the updated status immediately after the action.
A success message is shown inline on the card after a successful status update.
An error message is shown if the update fails.
Registration and login components are not modified.

constraints: Do NOT modify any Registration or Login components (CustomerLogin, AdminLogin) or their related auth logic.
Do NOT change the existing navigation flow, splash screen, or any working screens.
Do NOT alter frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, or any files under frontend/src/components/ui.
nonGoals: Adding new features beyond the four fixes listed.
Changing the visual design or color theme.
Modifying the chatbot, service catalog, or contact screen.
Implementing real-time updates or WebSocket-based order tracking.
Changing the admin credentials or adding new admin users.
